item.title: EU Withdrawal of Levamisole Recommended Due to CNS Risks
item.description: Europe’s medicines regulator confirmed that leukoencephalopathy is a rare but serious side effect of levamisole-containing medicines. Medscape News Eu...

item.title: NHS 3.3% Pay Rise Condemned by Unions
item.description: The government says the 3.3% NHS pay award is above forecast inflation, but unions warn it will deepen recruitment and retention pressures. Medscape N...

item.title: Sex Disparity Seen in Response to Growth Therapy in 21-OHD
item.description: In patients with classical 21-hydroxylase deficiency, growth-promoting therapies have variable effects: They increase final height relative to midpare...

item.title: Sex Hormones Linked to CV Risk in Men but Not Women With T2D
item.description: Findings from the LookAHEAD trial also show that the effect of sex hormones differed by the amount of weight loss. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Video Interpreters Improve Care for Deaf Patients
item.description: Presence of a live video interpreter during consultations may help improve some aspects of communication between doctors and patients with deafness. M...
